items.maltese: Meta nkun ħdejn il-baħar, inħossni rilassat.
items.english: When I am near the sea, I feel relaxed. (male speaker)

items.maltese: Meta nkun ħdejn il-baħar, inħossni rilassata.
items.english: When I am near the sea, I feel relaxed. (female speaker)

items.maltese: Meta jkolli ħafna xogħol, inħossni inkwetat.
items.english: When I have a lot of work, I feel worried. (male speaker)

items.maltese: Meta jkolli ħafna xogħol, inħossni inkwetata.
items.english: When I have a lot of work, I feel worried. (female speaker)
When I meet friends, I feel content. (male speaker)
When I meet friends, I feel content. (female speaker)
Why do you feel like that?
Because today I have good news.

items.maltese: Inħossni imbarazzat / imbarazzata meta nagħmel żball.
items.english: I feel embarrassed when I make a mistake.
I do not like feeling negative.

items.maltese: Meta jkolli ħin għalija, inħossni kwiet / kwieta.
items.english: When I have time for myself, I feel quiet / calm.

items.maltese: Meta xi ħadd jgħinni, inħossni kuntent / kuntenta.
items.english: When someone helps me, I feel content.

items.maltese: Jien ma nħossnix aggressiv / agressiva llum.
items.english: I do not feel aggressive today.
